ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "income" REAL /* Income level of the participant */,
  "race" TEXT /* Racial background of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the participant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the participant */,
  "voter_registration_status" TEXT /* Voter registration status of the participant */,
  "voting_history" TEXT /* Voting history of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_orientations" (
  "orient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orientation entry */,
  "demog_id" INTEGER /* Reference to demographic entry */,
  "conservative" INTEGER /* Percentage of participants identifying as conservative */,
  "moderate" INTEGER /* Percentage of participants identifying as moderate */,
  "liberal" INTEGER /* Percentage of participants identifying as liberal */,
  "undecided" INTEGER /* Percentage of participants who are undecided */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of participants in this demographic group */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the demographic group */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., survey, census) */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Margin of error for the percentages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_political_orientations_demog_id FOREIGN KEY ("demog_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_political_orientations_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the survey */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the survey */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Percentage of participants who responded */,
  "geographic_coverage" TEXT /* Geographic areas covered by the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey */,
  "demog_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic entry */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of the response */,
  "conservative" INTEGER /* Participant identifies as conservative */,
  "moderate" INTEGER /* Participant identifies as moderate */,
  "liberal" INTEGER /* Participant identifies as liberal */,
  "undecided" INTEGER /* Participant is undecided */,
  "voting_history" TEXT /* Voting history of the participant */,
  "voter_registration_status" TEXT /* Voter registration status of the participant */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes from the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_demog_id FOREIGN KEY ("demog_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the report */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module or feature the permission applies to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission mapping */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module or feature the permission applies to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_perm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES permissions ("role"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the user was assigned the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the role was removed or expired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES permissions ("role"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the visualization */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, pie chart) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viz_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the visualization */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viz_access_viz_id FOREIGN KEY ("viz_id") REFERENCES data_visualizations ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viz_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
